plugins.name: youtube-summary
plugins.description: Summarize a YouTube video into a structured Obsidian note (TL;DR, takeaways, chapters), with opt-in slide extraction that embeds key slides inline.

plugins.name: plangate
plugins.description: Terminal-native plan-review loop: your agent writes the plan to a file, you review it inline in vim with > Q: / > A: markers, your :w re-invokes the agent to revise — no code until every question is answered and you approve.
